transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Did you check the lost and found for your calculator?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. Someone turned it in yesterday, so I was able to pick it up this morning.

choices.text: He found his calculator at the lost and found.
He bought a new calculator yesterday.
He still cannot find his calculator.
He lent his calculator to someone.

questions.explanation: He says someone turned in the calculator and he picked it up this morning.
questions.evidence: Someone turned it in yesterday, so I was able to pick it up this morning.
